_comment: Dialogue scripts. Each entry has an id, optional speaker name, and an array of text pages. Choices branch to other dialogue ids.

pages: The weight of the world presses down on these forgotten lands...
The Empire marches on. Town after town falls silent.
But somewhere, in the frozen north, something ancient stirs.

dialogues.speaker: Terra
pages: Where... am I? My head feels like it's full of smoke.
I remember flashes — the Empire, a man in a cape... magic.
Was that me? Did I do all that?

dialogues.speaker: Old Man
pages: Be careful out there. The mines are dangerous since the Magitek soldiers arrived.
Rumour has it something froze them solid. Something from inside the mine.

choices.text: Tell me more about the mines.

dialogues.speaker: Old Man
pages: The mines run deep under the mountains.
They say the Esper in there has been sleeping for a thousand years.
The Empire wants it. But it doesn't want them.
Victory! The party gained {exp} EXP and {gp} GP.
